label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4

extraction.one_line_summary: JACOBSEN Fabio won from screened position behind DÉMARE after PHILIPSEN was boxed out in technical finale compression
tactical_patterns: SÉNÉCHAL took intermediate sprint points specifically to deny JACOBSEN's green jersey rivals, revealing Deceuninck sprint denial tactics.
Technical finale compression at 3km created positioning chaos; DÉMARE led out but JACOBSEN screened behind won from invisibility.
PHILIPSEN boxed out despite green jersey suggests leadout teams targeted him specifically in finale positioning battle.

rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: positive: Beat top-tier sprinters from screened position, showing confidence fully restored after long injury recovery
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: Boxed out in technical finale despite wearing green jersey and having leadout support
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: neutral: Successfully navigated technical finale to lead sprint but couldn't hold off JACOBSEN's late acceleration
rider_signals.TARAMAE Rein: neutral: Crashed inside 3km rule but retained red jersey; vulnerability in finale positioning exposed
